title: Conditional Code Generation
scenario: Write a Python function that generates a piece of code based on a set of conditional statements. The function should take in a list of rules and a list of variables, and produce a code snippet that meets the specified conditions.
constraints: Must be a single Python function
Must use conditional statements to control the code generation
Must include at least three different conditional statements

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the generated code is syntactically correct.
Check that the function meets the constraints of using at least three conditional statements.
Evaluate the correctness of the conditional logic used in the function.
